title: Massive Open World
description: Explore the sprawling state of Leonida — from neon city blocks to sun-bleached beaches and tangled swamps — seamlessly, with no loading walls.

title: Next-Gen Graphics
description: A ground-up visual overhaul brings ray-traced light, dense crowds and lifelike materials to every neon-drenched street corner.

title: Vehicles
description: Cars, bikes, boats and aircraft are rebuilt with new handling and physics, so every getaway feels tactile and distinct.

title: The Map
description: The most detailed Rockstar map yet weaves dense urban sprawl together with rural backroads, wetlands and open coastline.

title: Dynamic Weather
description: Tropical heat, rolling storms and hurricane warnings reshape the world in real time, changing how the city looks and feels.

title: Living Wildlife
description: Alligators lurk in the swamps, flamingos wade the shallows and the ecosystem of Leonida lives and breathes around you.

title: Smarter NPC AI
description: A new behavior system gives pedestrians routines, reactions and personalities, making the world feel genuinely alive.

title: Dual-Protagonist Story
description: Follow Lucia and Jason through an intertwined crime saga, switching perspectives across a sprawling, cinematic campaign.

title: Online Mode
description: An evolving multiplayer experience is planned to arrive after launch, expanding Vice City with friends for years to come.
